case_title: ARE-SAN FRANCISCO NO.36 OWNER, LLC VS. TEKINALHAJ INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOING ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARE-SAN FRANCISCO NO.36 OWNER, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEKINALHAJ INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOING BUSINESS AS "ODA RESTAURANT" THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1500 OWENS STREET, SUITE 100, IN THE CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CALIFORNIA 94158 AND MORE COMMONLY KNOWN AS *ODA RESTAURANT*, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANT IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210032534)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (COMMERCIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARE-SAN FRANCISCO NO.36 OWNER, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TEKINALHAJ INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOING BUSINESS AS "ODA RESTAURANT" DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT TEKINALHAJ INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOING BUSINESS AS "ODA RESTAURANT"
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $163.83 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) (TRANSACTION ID # 210032951) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARE-SAN FRANCISCO NO.36 OWNER, LLC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TEKINALHAJ INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOING BUSINESS AS "ODA RESTAURANT"

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 210031090), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARE-SAN FRANCISCO NO.36 OWNER, LLC SERVED MAR-13-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAR-13-2023 AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 210032534) AS TO DEFENDANT TEKINALHAJ INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOING BUSINESS AS "ODA RESTAURANT"

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARE-SAN FRANCISCO NO.36 OWNER, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TEKINALHAJ INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOING BUSINESS AS "ODA RESTAURANT" DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 210031090), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARE-SAN FRANCISCO NO.36 OWNER, LLC SERVED MAR-13-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TEKINALHAJ INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOING BUSINESS AS "ODA RESTAURANT"
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210032534) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION (TRANSACTION ID # 210035881) FILED BY DEFENDANT TEKIN, OYA

PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF EX PARTE MOTION FOR STAY OF EXECUTION; NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND ANY DEFAULT, AND TO QUASH ANY WRIT OF POSSESSION. (TRANSACTION ID # 210035881) FILED BY DEFENDANT TEKIN, OYA
